constraints.message: Latency percentiles MUST be non-decreasing: p50_ms ≤ p95_ms ≤ p99_ms ≤ max_ms (FR-B7).
constraints.evaluation_note: FR-B7 percentile monotonicity. Library-evaluated by the LOCAL builtin `percentiles_monotonic_nondecreasing` (NEW in PR-A3.5). Pure-shape: no consumer state required, no manifest emission for 'deferred' (the property is evaluable from the envelope alone). Reports the FIRST violating pair (e.g., 'p95_ms < p50_ms') so operators see the specific failing transition. Equal percentiles are allowed (≤ check, not <).
